parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (name, email, status, tally_payload, user_profile)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET
  updated_at    = NOW(),
  name          = EXCLUDED.name,
  tally_payload = EXCLUDED.tally_payload,
  user_profile  = EXCLUDED.user_profile
RETURNING id, email, status
UPDATE leads SET program_plan = $1::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = $2 RETURNING id, email

parameters.jsCode:
const result = items[0].json;
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', message: 'Lead saved and program plan generated', email: result.email } }];
